intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding current plant health and presence. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/lost. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are indistinguishable or lost. P3 (Pothos) is the only surviving specimen, though severely compromised.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss (Yellow pot is empty/soil only)
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss (No viable mint foliage detected)
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present (Pothos leaf and rabbit anchor visible)
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss (No silver guest foliage detected)

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.P2_P4: Shared black pot contains debris (eggshells) but no identifiable plant matter.
plant_audit.P3: Single Pothos leaf remains; petiole appears thin and potentially necrotic.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots; potential for root rot.
biome_observations.debris: Significant presence of crushed eggshells in P2/P4; electronic component (likely a connector) introduced to the desk surface in later images.

temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-1: Progressive loss of light and clarity; plant structures remain static but show no signs of growth or recovery.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Introduction of a USB-C cable/connector on the desk surface; lighting restored to reveal the continued absence of P1, P2, and P4.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of terminal decline. P3 is the only remnant of the original registry. The lack of new growth and the presence of debris suggest a neglected environment.
anomalies: Crushed eggshells in P2/P4 (likely calcium supplementation attempt).
Electronic connector (USB-C) introduced to the desk space.
Total absence of P1, P2, and P4.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a failed botanical environment. The original registry is no longer representative of the physical reality. Only one Pothos leaf survives in P3. The soil appears saturated, and the presence of non-botanical debris (eggshells, electronics) indicates an unstable environment for plant life.
